chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1381 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.1 & 18 2. For hearing of Misc. No.6916/2025 3. For hearing of main case 21.04.2025 Mr. Zain A. Jatoi, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Abdullah Appraising Officer, Collector of Customs Export PMBQ/respondents No.2 & 3 Mr. Muhammad Shoaib for respondent No.4 Mr. Muhammad Siddique advocate files Vakalatnama of Sardar Zafar Hussain advocate and statement along with certain documents on behalf of respondent No.2 & 3, which are taken on record. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, show cause notices have been impugned herein, however, he states that the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the notices be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and in the meanwhile no coercive action be taken there against. Learned officers representing the respondents as well as their learned counsel articulate no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
